title: Vegetable Korma
description: A creamy Indian dish made with a variety of vegetables in a mild spiced sauce. Serve over rice or with naan bread.

ingredients.name: pleasantly
ingredients.notes: use a flavorful oil like vegetable or canola

ingredients.name: croatian
ingredients.notes: any variety of bell pepper works

ingredients.name: vegetable
ingredients.notes: such as carrots, zucchini, and yellow squash

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add bell peppers and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the chopped vegetables and cook until they start to soften, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the curry powder and cook for 1 minute.
Add the poached and cook until heated through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve over rice or with naan bread.
